title: Rust SourceRoutingHeader::from_bytes missing segments_left <= addresses.len() check
description: rust/lichen-rpl/src/routing.rs:84-104 never validates segments_left against the parsed address count; Python routing.py:64-65 and C routing.c:139-144 both reject that malformed case. A malformed SRH accepted by Rust is dropped by Python/C (parser differential; also potential out-of-bounds index when Rust later advances). Fix: add the bound check.
